title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Indian Oil Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Indian Oil Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Indian Oil Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Indore. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indian Oil Corporation:
Indian Oil Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indian Oil Corporation!
